Paths/Frontend Development

Frontend Development

Master the art of building beautiful, interactive user interfaces for the web.

1

HTML Basics

Learn the building blocks of every web page — elements, attributes, and document structure.

beginner
→
2

CSS Fundamentals

Style your web pages with colors, layouts, typography, and responsive design.

beginner
→
3

JavaScript Essentials

Add interactivity and logic to your web pages with JavaScript.

beginner
→
4

React Basics

Build component-based UIs with the most popular frontend library.

intermediate
→
5

Next.js Fundamentals

Learn server-side rendering, routing, and full-stack React with Next.js.

intermediate
→
